gist.headline: Watering the greenhouse
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just finished its daily rounds, checking on the health and metrics of all the amazing apps in our community greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics and health checks.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app directory up-to-date with the latest usage statistics and health statuses.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot checking on a digital greenhouse. The robot's screen shows a green checkmark, representing the automated health checks.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot watering a digital greenhouse full of glowing code-plants. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby, its screen showing a bright green checkmark. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby, its screen showing a bright green checkmark. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background.
